headline: Norfolk Southern awarded control of disputed eastern port rail line
summary: Norfolk Southern has been formally granted control of a Virginia port railroad by federal regulators. The post Norfolk Southern awarded control of disputed eastern port rail line appeared first on FreightWaves.
